notes: Headquartered at 200 Forest Street, Marlboro, MA 01752; creator and vendor of Multia; acquired by Compaq 1998, then HP 2002
Supplier of Windows NT Workstation 3.51 and Windows 95, both used on Multia
Provided Netscape Navigator bundled as the Multia web browser; acquired by AOL 1999
Maker of Rumba terminal emulator, bundled with Multia as an Information Access product
Maker of Kea! terminal emulator, bundled with Multia as an Information Access product
Referenced as supplier of NetBEUI LAN protocol and IBM mainframes accessed via 3270 emulation
Supplier of IPX/SPX network protocol supported in Multia communications stack

successor: Harte-Hanks (2001) -> Aberdeen Group brand reacquired by various entities
notes: Author and publisher of this product profile; headquartered at One Boston Place, Boston, MA 02108
